name: project-product-skills
description: A cross-agent skill kit for running projects and products: decisions, requirements, discovery, delivery, launch, PRINCE2 documentation, workshops, and team rituals.

interface.shortDescription: Day-to-day operating skills for projects and products.
interface.longDescription: A focused skill kit for managing projects and products: meeting decisions, status updates, requirements, research, prioritization, delivery planning, launch readiness, PRINCE2 documentation, workshops, hiring, onboarding, and team offsites.
